title: Riot Platforms Full Year 2025 Financial Results & Strategic Highlights
text: Riot Platforms 2025 marked a watershed year for the company with a strategic evolution driven by unlocking the company's large, nearly two-gigawatt power portfolio for high-demand data center infrastructure. Total revenue reached $647.4 million, up 72% from $376.7 million in 2024. Bitcoin mining revenue: $576.3 million (vs. $321.0 million in 2024). Produced 5,686 bitcoin (up from 4,828 in 2024). Cost to mine one bitcoin (excluding depreciation): $49,645. Gross profit: $302 million. Bitcoin holdings: 18,005 BTC (~$1.6 billion at year-end pricing). Cash on hand: $309.8 million. Engineering Segment: Revenue of $64.7 million (vs. $38.5 million in 2024). Realized $23.2 million in capex savings since ESS Metron acquisition. CEO Jason Les stated the company achieved a strategic evolution by unlocking their power portfolio for data center infrastructure. AMD Partnership: Successfully commenced operations on the first phase of an AMD data center lease as of January 2026, generating revenue. Site Improvements: Strategic land acquisitions at Corsicana and Rockdale facilities. Positioning: Management emphasized being uniquely equipped to aggressively scale infrastructure with $1.9 billion in liquidity.
